heading: Duties of Archivist
label: 6 Duties of Archivist
notes: Amendments2022— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section related to credentials of electors, transmission to Archivist of the United States and to Congress, and public inspection.Pub. L. 117–3281984— substituted “Archivist of the United States” for “Administrator of General Services” in section catchline and wherever appearing in text and “National Archives and Records Administration” for “General Services Administration”.Pub. L. 98–4971951—Act , substituted “Administrator of General Services” for “Secretary of State” in section catchline and several places in text, and for “Secretary of State of the United States” in one place, and “General Services Administration” for “State Department”.Oct. 31, 1951
Effective Date of 1984 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under , Public Printing and Documents.Pub. L. 98–497section 301 of Pub. L. 98–497section 2102 of Title 44Apr. 1, 1985
